title: filago germanica subsp. eriocephala
intro: Filago germanica subsp. eriocephala, also known as the German daisy or coton grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and is believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Filago germanica subsp. eriocephala can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
